# Auto-generated by scripts/scaffold_modules.sh (Phase 4 bootstrap).
# Modules are listed bottom-up (dependencies before dependents).

add_subdirectory(common)
add_subdirectory(platform)
add_subdirectory(logging)
add_subdirectory(profiler)
add_subdirectory(config)
add_subdirectory(threadpool)
add_subdirectory(device)
add_subdirectory(tensor)
add_subdirectory(quant)
add_subdirectory(memory)
add_subdirectory(kernel)
add_subdirectory(core)
add_subdirectory(stream)
add_subdirectory(kv)
add_subdirectory(backend)
add_subdirectory(tokenizer)
add_subdirectory(graph)
add_subdirectory(planner)
add_subdirectory(model)
add_subdirectory(adapter)
add_subdirectory(executor)
add_subdirectory(scheduler)
add_subdirectory(context)
add_subdirectory(runtime)

# ── Aggregate library: the embeddable engine (stable C ABI) ──
add_library(hummingbird STATIC hummingbird.c)
add_library(hummingbird::hummingbird ALIAS hummingbird)
target_include_directories(hummingbird PUBLIC "${HB_INCLUDE_DIR}" PRIVATE "${HB_SRC_DIR}")
# Linking runtime transitively pulls in every core module.
target_link_libraries(hummingbird PUBLIC hb_runtime)
hb_apply_common(hummingbird)

if(HB_BUILD_TESTS)
    add_executable(test_hummingbird hummingbird_test.c)
    target_link_libraries(test_hummingbird PRIVATE hummingbird)
    hb_apply_common(test_hummingbird)
    add_test(NAME hummingbird_api COMMAND test_hummingbird)
endif()
